---
pagetitle: "Workshops - Architecture 2.0"
description: "A maintainer-reviewed registry and archive of workshops relevant to Architecture 2.0, ML for systems, hardware/software co-design, and AI-assisted computer architecture."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
listing:
  - id: workshop-registry
    contents: workshops.yml
    template: _workshop-card.ejs.md
    categories: true
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: false
    fields: [title, description, venue, when, status, last_verified, location, organizers, institution, submission_url, deadline, history, categories]
    field-required: [title, url, description, venue, status, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap">
<header class="site-masthead">
  <span class="pill">Architecture 2.0</span>
  <span class="pill hot">Participation and archive</span>
</header>

<section class="site-hero">
  <div class="hub-kicker">Workshop tracker</div>
  <h1>Workshops</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Current calls when available, with prior events retained as an archive</p>
</section>

<p class="site-lede">
This page tracks workshops, special sessions, and recurring venues where
AI-assisted computer architecture, ML for systems, hardware/software co-design,
agentic design loops, and supporting tools are discussed. Event status is
verified explicitly so an expired call does not appear active.
</p>

<p class="site-lede">
If you are organizing a current workshop or call for participation, submit it
through the template. Maintainers review the proposed entry before it appears.
</p>

<nav class="site-actions" aria-label="Workshop actions">
  <a class="site-action" href="/submit-workshop.html">Submit a workshop <span class="arr" aria-hidden="true">&rarr;</span></a>
  <a class="site-action secondary" href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/arch2/discussions">Discuss fit</a>
  <a class="site-action tertiary" href="/tools/index.html">Browse tools</a>
</nav>

<div class="category-strip" role="group" aria-label="Workshop categories">
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('')">All</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJlJTIwMi4w')">Architecture 2.0</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('TUwlMjBmb3IlMjBTeXN0ZW1z')">ML for systems</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QWdlbnRpYyUyMEFJ')">Agentic AI</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('Q29tcHV0ZXIlMjBBcmNoaXRlY3R1cmU=')">Computer architecture</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('RURBJTIwYW5kJTIwVG9vbHM=')">EDA and tools</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QmVuY2htYXJrcyUyMGFuZCUyMERhdGFzZXRz')">Benchmarks and datasets</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('RWR1Y2F0aW9u')">Education</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('Q29tbXVuaXR5')">Community</button>
</div>
</div>
```

:::{#workshop-registry}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var listing = window.quartoListings?.["listing-workshop-registry"] ||
    window["quarto-listings"]?.["listing-workshop-registry"];
  var input = document.querySelector("#listing-workshop-registry .search");
  if (!listing || !input) {
    return;
  }
  input.addEventListener("input", function () {
    listing.search(input.value);
  });
});
</script>
```
